Hey, what's going on everyone? One of the natural questions that comes up is how do I do the perfect pitch for the green play? And so this presentation kind of summarizes both what we found as the best practices for if you're not doing the green play, just credit only, or if you're also doing the choice at the end. And just some of the things that we found were the most effective. Okay, so I'm going to go right through it. So make sure that you're spending time on that and that everyone's kind of answering that with you. You're basically break their beliefs around the fact that no matter what they're looking for, it's not going to get soft in six weeks. That's what the questionnaire is there to do before you begin the presentation. Now that that is out of the way, you'll start the presentation. Everything is the same as the first one that I explained here. You would want to obviously put in your story. We show all these things. And here we go. So this is a pre-qualification question that we're asking a little bit more overtly. Okay, so question one is do you believe or you believe that 100% you can be a success story? Either 25 plus miles or 6% body fat. Raise your hand if right? So if you don't believe this, then you like we won't be able to move forward with you. All right, then people raise their hand. You're like, awesome. Okay, second, believe you are 100% in control of decisions about your health. Reason I asked this is because I had a girl named Jessica. And at second week into the program, her husband said that she couldn't bring the groceries in the house anymore. And she asked to ask permission to her husband for when she could go work out and stuff like that. So if that's a situation, I'm sorry, but that won't fit. We just need to have like adults who are able to make decisions about their own health here. So if you're in control, 100% control the decisions about your health in terms of work out times financially, raise your hand, right? Then they'll raise their hand. This is overcoming the spouse. Objection later. Third qualification, you can make a decision today that you want to change your health. Okay, now if you're uncertain or need to think about it, you won't go all in. So let me tell you a story of why we do this and why we ask for people to make the decision today. I told you earlier that my goal was to have 100% success rate. We have an 87% success rate as is. And I would like to get 100% in this next challenge. So Brittany was someone who actually was a friend of mine growing up. Does anyone have a friend of theirs that growing up, they changed their boyfriend like the, they changed the calendars on the month, right? Like every month they had a new boyfriend, right? Okay. So for me, my friend Brittany was like that and every month they would chew, call me and she would tell me how this new guy was so great. But had X, Y and Z. That was one of the reasons that I wasn't going to work out, right? And what do you think happened to each of her relationships? They didn't work out. Why? And then people will say, oh, she wasn't committed. You know, she always just trying to find problems. It was like, right. So she wasn't sure. And so what we figured out is that for every person that we've ever had to beg to change their lives, they have never successfully completed the challenge. And so for that reason, it's either you're in or you're out today. And it's just because we really care about our success percentages. And in the past, the people who are like unsure either way are not the right fit. And we're okay with that. We just want to make sure like just we care about taking care of the people who are going to make the best results. Right. Does that make sense? Great. Um, at this point, it's really what your preference is. Um, those, all three of those ways that I just described are ways that different people who were succeeding were doing it.
